modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Coyote Careers portal.

full_description_text: User was trying to log into Coyote Careers. They couldn't get in at all. The page just wouldn't load. This happened during a live chat, and they were frustrated.
short_description: Unable to access Coyote Careers portal.
description: User was trying to log into Coyote Careers. They couldn't get in at all. The page just wouldn't load. This happened during a live chat, and they were frustrated.
